title: taraxacum subelatum
intro: Taraxacum subelatum is a lesser-known species of dandelion, a flowering plant native to certain regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its distinctive yellow flowers and jagged leaf edges. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum subelatum lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum subelatum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
